news.t: New Direxion ETFs Look at Precious Metals & Crypto

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Bitcoin Bull 2X ETF (BTCU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the price performance of bitcoin. BTCU was launched on May 27, 2026 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: CME CF Bitcoin Reference Rate - New York Variant - Benchmark Price Return

data.title: New Direxion ETFs Look at Precious Metals & Crypto
data.text: On Wednesday, May 27, Direxion expanded its coverage of leveraged & inverse ETFs with the launch of four new ETFs. Each of these ETFs takes a leveraged look at a different precious metal or cryptocurr...
